parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM "workflow_entity"
 WHERE "id" <> '{{ $json.wId_error }}' 
 AND "workflow_entity"."isArchived"=false
 AND (
    CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%{{ $json.wId_error }}%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%executionOrder%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%saveExecutionProgress%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%errorWorkflow%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%callerPolicy%'
 --   OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%executionTimeout%'
 --   OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%timeSavedPerExecution%'
  )

SELECT * FROM "workflow_entity"
 WHERE "id" <> '{{ $json.wId_error }}' 
 AND "workflow_entity"."isArchived"=false
 AND (
    CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%{{ $json.wId_error }}%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%executionOrder%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%saveExecutionProgress%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%errorWorkflow%'
    OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%callerPolicy%'
 --   OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%executionTimeout%'
 --   OR CAST("settings" AS TEXT) NOT LIKE '%timeSavedPerExecution%'
  )
